$comment: Shared MCP tools for every agent on this repo. github/context7 are REMOTE/http endpoints so the cloud Replit agent can reach them too (tokens come from env vars, never committed). github = the cross-agent coordination bus (issues/PRs/reviews); context7 = current library docs. Verified live 2026-07-09: POST https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ initialize returns tools/prompts/resources. grepai is LOCAL-ONLY (stdio, spawns a binary on the machine) — it only works for agents running directly on Igor's Mac (e.g. this Claude Code CLI), NOT for the cloud Replit agent. It is a free/local semantic code-search index (Tree-sitter chunking + Ollama nomic-embed-text embeddings, zero cloud calls, zero ongoing cost) — see docs/LOCAL-SEMANTIC-CODE-INDEX.md for setup/rationale/limitations. Added 2026-07-24.
